title: Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur
tagline: Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the seven major Shiva temples. Shiva is worshiped as Mahalingeswaraswamy, and is represented by the lingam, with his idol referred to as Jyothirmayalingam. His consort Mookambika is depicted as Devi Bruhatsundarakuchaambika or Bruhatsundarakuchaambigai amman.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivayoginathar Temple also known as Yoganandeswarar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in is located in Thiruvisanallur in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as purathaneshwarar in krutha yuga,yoganandheeswarar in threytha yuga,vilvaaranyeshwarar in dhwabara yuga and Sivayoganathar in kali yuga, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as soundhara nayaki or shantha Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Kampaheswarar Temple, Thirubuvanam
topPlaces.description: The Kampaheswarar Temple or kampa-hara-ishvarar ( kampa-hareswarar ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva. It is situated in Thirubuvanam, a village in Thanjavur district in the South Indian State of Tamil Nadu, on the Mayiladuthurai-Kumbakonam road.

topPlaces.name: Vannakkudi
topPlaces.description: Vannakkudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, in India.

topPlaces.name: Sathanur, Thiruvidaimarudur South
topPlaces.description: Sathanur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town contains the Tirumular Temple, a Hindu shrine.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvidaimarudur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvidaimarudur (also spelt as Thiruvidaimaradur or Tiruvidaimarudur) is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is notable for its Mahalingeshwarar Temple, a Hindu shrine for Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Serugudi
topPlaces.description: Serugudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated between Thiruppanandal and Pandanallur.

topPlaces.name: Veppathur
topPlaces.description: Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).

topPlaces.name: Govindapuram, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Govindapuram is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated at a distance of 7 kilometres from Kumbakonam and 27 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai and 1 kilometre from Thiruvidaimarudur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur?
faq.a: Stays in Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple, Kampaheswarar Temple, Thirubuvanam, Vannakkudi, Sathanur, Thiruvidaimarudur South, Thiruvidaimarudur.
